Jan van Goyen

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Panoramic View of the Spaarne
by Jan van Goyen
Dutch Golden Age · 1644
An enormous sky and a low horizon — Haarlem on the right, a windmill on the left, the flat world between them. The template for every Dutch landscape that came after.
View of Emmerich
by Jan van Goyen
Netherlands · 1645 · oil on wood
←Goya Francesco Granacci→
